confidence.label: moderate
confidence.rationale: Maximum collective-immortality score is directly supported by the DK Constitution preamble (sacrifice of children by the hundreds of thousands) and the national anthem (blood as constitutive of the nation). Confidence capped at moderate pending chain expansion.

reviewNote: Score value 5/5 defensible: collective-immortality mechanism (Year Zero temporal annihilation, agrarian utopia as eternal return) supports maximum collective-immortality score. Confidence 0.65 reflects chain-requires-expansion (chain is minimal) and the instrumental-vs-symbolic interpretive dispute. Hold at score-review until chain expansion to ≥4 passages.
